creator: mike@sentex.net
text:
(In reply to Phil Dennis-Jordan from comment #18)
Are you able to update to FreeBSD 14.2p1 ?  You will see a bit more info in there. 

igc0: <Intel(R) Ethernet Controller I226-V> mem 0x80a00000-0x80afffff,0x80b00000-0x80b03fff at device 0.0 on pci1
igc0: EEPROM V2.14-0 eTrack 0x80000290
igc0: Using 1024 TX descriptors and 1024 RX descriptors
igc0: Using 4 RX queues 4 TX queues
igc0: Using MSI-X interrupts with 5 vectors
igc0: Ethernet address: 60:be:b4:xx:xx:xx
igc0: netmap queues/slots: TX 4/1024, RX 4/1024

I have had pretty good stability with 14.2
